nodes.name: beam.py
nodes.summary: Bilevel Episodic-Associative Memory (BEAM) architecture implementing Mnemosyne's core memory subsystem with working memory, episodic memory, scratchpad, vector search via sqlite-vec, FTS5 full-text retrieval, and hybrid ranking. Contains the main BeamMemory class with 65 methods for remember, recall, sleep, consolidation, polyphonic recall, fact extraction, and memory diagnostics.
nodes.languageNotes: Python module using sqlite-vec for native vector search, FTS5 for full-text, and a 50/30/20 hybrid ranking formula.

nodes.name: BeamMemory
nodes.summary: Core memory class implementing the BEAM architecture. Manages working memory (hot cache), episodic memory (long-term storage), scratchpad (agent workspace), polyphonic recall, fact extraction, entity linking, temporal boosting, sleep consolidation, and export/import. Contains 65 methods for the full memory lifecycle.

nodes.name: _BeamConnection
nodes.summary: Thread-local database connection wrapper with deferred commit support for batch operations.

nodes.name: init_beam
nodes.summary: Initializes the beam database schema including working_memory, episodic_memory, scratchpad, consolidated_episodic tables, FTS5 indexes, and sqlite-vec virtual tables. Creates all required indexes and triggers.

nodes.name: _get_connection
nodes.summary: Gets or creates a thread-local sqlite3 connection to the beam database, enabling sqlite-vec extension, setting WAL/journal mode, and enforcing foreign keys.

nodes.name: _detect_vec_type
nodes.summary: Probes the database to detect which vector storage type is in use (sqlite-vec, binary vectors, or none).

nodes.name: _lexical_relevance
nodes.summary: Computes a lexical relevance score between query tokens and memory content using token overlap scoring with position-aware penalties.

nodes.name: _vec_search
nodes.summary: Performs vector similarity search against the episodic_memory vec_episodes table using sqlite-vec, returning top-k results.

nodes.name: _wm_vec_search
nodes.summary: Performs vector similarity search against working memory embeddings, with graceful fallback on errors.

nodes.name: _fts_search
nodes.summary: Full-text search against episodic_memory using FTS5, returning top-k results ranked by BM25 relevance.

nodes.name: _cjk_like_search
nodes.summary: Specialized LIKE-based search for CJK (Chinese/Japanese/Korean) text that doesn't require word boundaries, generating n-gram patterns for matching.

nodes.name: _vec_insert
nodes.summary: Inserts a vector embedding into the vec_episodes or vec_wm tables, handling binary vector compression when enabled.

nodes.name: _extract_and_store_entities
nodes.summary: Extracts named entities from memory content using regex patterns and stores them in the entity linking tables.

nodes.name: _extract_and_store_facts
nodes.summary: Extracts factual statements from memory content using regex/heuristic patterns and stores them as structured facts with source attribution.

nodes.name: _recency_decay
nodes.summary: Computes a recency-based decay multiplier using exponential decay with configurable half-life.

nodes.name: _temporal_boost
nodes.summary: Applies a temporal relevance boost to memory scores based on how close the memory timestamp is to the query time.

nodes.name: _strict_fact_matches
nodes.summary: Performs strict fact-level matching between query and stored fact text, checking for subject-predicate-object alignment.

nodes.name: _source_to_trust_tier
nodes.summary: Maps memory source identifiers (e.g., 'user', 'assistant', 'system') to trust tiers for veracity-weighted scoring.

nodes.name: _normalize_weights
nodes.summary: Normalizes vector, FTS, and importance weights to sum to 1.0 for the hybrid ranking formula, with validation and clamping.

nodes.name: _cjk_fts_terms
nodes.summary: Generates FTS5-compatible search terms for CJK text by splitting on character boundaries and creating valid FTS5 query syntax.

nodes.name: _find_memories_by_entity
nodes.summary: Searches for memories linked to a given entity name using the entity-mentions index table.

nodes.name: _find_memories_by_fact
nodes.summary: Retrieves memories that contain factual statements matching the query, using strict fact matching with relevance scoring.

nodes.name: _in_memory_vec_search
nodes.summary: Performs in-memory vector similarity search as a fallback when sqlite-vec extension is unavailable, computing cosine similarity directly.

nodes.name: _deferred_commits
nodes.summary: Context manager for deferred commits that batches multiple database operations into a single transaction for performance.

nodes.name: _sanitize_utf8
nodes.summary: Sanitizes text by removing or replacing invalid UTF-8 sequences to prevent database insertion errors.

nodes.name: _detect_veracity_weight_overrides
nodes.summary: Detects environment variable overrides for veracity weighting configuration used in truthfulness-scored recall.

nodes.name: _store_facts_in_table
nodes.summary: Stores extracted fact triples (subject-predicate-object) in the facts database table with source and memory ID linkage.

nodes.name: _env_truthy
nodes.summary: Parses environment variable as a boolean truthy value supporting '1', 'true', 'yes', 'on' (case-insensitive).

nodes.name: _env_float
nodes.summary: Parses environment variable as a float with logging warnings for parse failures.

nodes.name: _env_disabled
nodes.summary: Checks if a feature toggle environment variable is set to a falsy/disabled value.

nodes.name: _warn_about_veracity_weight_overrides
nodes.summary: Logs warnings when non-standard veracity weight overrides are detected via environment variables.

nodes.name: chat_normalize.py
nodes.summary: Aggressive regex-based chat text normalization for Mnemosyne ingestion (NAI-1 experiment). Expands contractions, strips filler words, and adds implicit subjects to make casual messages parseable by structured extraction tools. Zero LLM calls, zero new dependencies.

nodes.name: normalize_chat
nodes.summary: Aggressively normalizes casual chat text by expanding contractions, stripping filler words, and optionally adding implicit subjects. Returns None for meaningless messages.

nodes.name: normalize_batch
nodes.summary: Batch-normalizes a list of message dicts by applying normalize_chat to each message's content field.

nodes.name: extraction_rate
nodes.summary: Computes the fraction of messages that survive normalization (have extractable meaning) for quality monitoring.

nodes.name: recall_diagnostics.py
nodes.summary: Recall path provenance diagnostics (C4 experiment). Exposes a process-global counter set that records per-recall-call signals: FTS hits, vec hits, and fallback usage. Operators query via get_recall_diagnostics() to measure fallback-usage rate over a measurement window. Read-only instrumentation that never alters recall behavior.

nodes.name: RecallDiagnostics
nodes.summary: Process-global recall diagnostics singleton that tracks per-tier counters (FTS hits, vec hits, fallback usage) for measuring recall path provenance.

nodes.name: _TierStats
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing per-tier recall counters including calls_with_hits and total_hits for measurement window analysis.

nodes.name: benchmark_beam.py
nodes.summary: Simple benchmark script that runs BeamMemory performance tests including writes, episodic insert, recall scaling, sleep, and scratchpad operations.

nodes.name: benchmark_beam_scale.py
nodes.summary: Scaling benchmark for BeamMemory that measures recall performance across varying dataset sizes to characterize time complexity.

nodes.name: benchmark_beam_working_memory.py
nodes.summary: Specialized benchmark focusing on working memory operations in BeamMemory, measuring trim, insert, and recall performance for the hot cache tier.

nodes.name: benchmark_vs_vectordbs.py
nodes.summary: Head-to-head retrieval benchmark comparing Mnemosyne (FTS5+vec hybrid) against FAISS (flat L2) and ChromaDB (HNSW) on the BEAM dataset. Measures ingestion throughput, storage size, retrieval latency, and Recall@10.

nodes.name: load_beam_data
nodes.summary: Loads BEAM dataset conversations at specified scales for comparative benchmark testing.

nodes.name: benchmark_mnemosyne
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Mnemosyne's hybrid (FTS5+vec) retrieval, measuring ingestion throughput and recall quality.

nodes.name: benchmark_faiss
nodes.summary: Benchmarks FAISS flat L2 vector search for comparative retrieval performance measurement.

nodes.name: benchmark_chroma
nodes.summary: Benchmarks ChromaDB HNSW vector search for comparative retrieval performance measurement.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that parses CLI args and orchestrates the full head-to-head benchmark across all three database backends.

nodes.name: test_ab_toggles.py
nodes.summary: Regression tests for the BEAM-recovery experiment A/B toggles. Each toggle is default-ON (production behavior unchanged) and disables the corresponding feature when set to a falsy env value. Tests pin default behavior, falsy disable, and functional ablation surface.

nodes.name: TestEnvDisabledHelper
nodes.summary: Tests the _env_disabled helper function that parses A/B toggle environment variables.

nodes.name: TestPolyphonicVoiceToggles
nodes.summary: Tests the polyphonic voice feature toggle (MNEMOSYNE_POLYPHONIC_VOICE) ensuring default-enabled behavior and falsy disable.

nodes.name: TestLinearBonusToggles
nodes.summary: Tests linear recall bonus feature toggles including entity/fact boost controls.

nodes.name: TestVeracityMultiplierToggle
nodes.summary: Tests the veracity multiplier toggle that controls truthfulness-weighted recall scoring.

nodes.name: TestCrossTierDedupToggle
nodes.summary: Tests the cross-tier deduplication feature toggle in recall results.

nodes.name: test_beam_db_path_string_coercion.py
nodes.summary: Tests for BeamMemory database path string coercion ensuring Path objects and string paths are handled consistently during database initialization and connection.

nodes.name: TestBeamMemoryDbPathCoercion
nodes.summary: Tests that BeamMemory handles both Path objects and string paths consistently throughout database operations.

nodes.name: test_beam_e3_additive_sleep.py
nodes.summary: Regression tests for E3 additive sleep contract where source working_memory rows remain after sleep (instead of being deleted), a consolidated_at timestamp column tracks processed rows, and recall surfaces both original and episodic summary rows.

nodes.name: TestE3AdditiveSleep
nodes.summary: Comprehensive tests for the additive sleep contract: source rows remain, consolidated_at is set, no double-summarization, and recall surfaces both tiers.

nodes.name: test_beam_e5_polyphonic_recall.py
nodes.summary: Tests for E5 polyphonic recall engine including feature flags, engine plumbing, filter enforcement, multiplier composition, telemetry updates, engine caching, and result shape validation.

nodes.name: TestE5FeatureFlag
nodes.summary: Tests the E5 polyphonic recall feature flag gating behavior.

nodes.name: TestE5EnginePlumbing
nodes.summary: Tests the internal plumbing of the polyphonic recall engine including RRF scoring.

nodes.name: TestE5FilterEnforcement
nodes.summary: Tests that polyphonic recall properly enforces tier and content-type filters.

nodes.name: test_benchmark_pure_recall_gate.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the pure recall gate that bypasses full-context formatting when MNEMOSYNE_PURE_RECALL env var is set, ensuring recall-only mode disables bypasses, handles env value parsing, and correctly routes through recall.

nodes.name: TestPureRecallModeDisablesBypasses
nodes.summary: Tests that pure recall mode properly disables full-context formatting bypasses.

nodes.name: TestPureRecallEnvValueParsing
nodes.summary: Tests environment variable value parsing for the MNEMOSYNE_PURE_RECALL toggle.

nodes.name: TestPureRecallPrecedenceOverFullContext
nodes.summary: Tests that pure recall mode takes precedence over full-context configuration.

nodes.name: test_c4_recall_diagnostics.py
nodes.summary: Tests for C4 recall diagnostics including RecallDiagnostics class behavior, process-global singleton management, BeamMemory recall instrumentation, and review hardening scenarios.

nodes.name: TestRecallDiagnosticsClass
nodes.summary: Tests the RecallDiagnostics class API including counter increment, query, and reset operations.

nodes.name: TestBeamRecallInstrumentation
nodes.summary: Tests that BeamMemory.recall properly instruments recall diagnostics counters for FTS, vec, and fallback paths.

nodes.name: TestReviewHardening
nodes.summary: Review hardening tests for edge cases in recall diagnostics including thread safety and concurrent access.

nodes.name: test_e1_benchmark_adapter_additive.py
nodes.summary: Tests for E1 additive benchmark adapter ingest, verifying that the benchmark adapter correctly processes messages through BeamMemory's remember pipeline without altering production defaults.

nodes.name: TestE1AdditiveBenchmarkIngest
nodes.summary: Tests E1 additive benchmark adapter ingest ensuring correct message processing through BeamMemory's remember pipeline.

nodes.name: test_e2_remember_batch_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Tests for E2 remember_batch enrichment including temporal annotations, source tracking, gist extraction, consolidated facts, per-row veracity, entity extraction, LLM fact extraction, and parity with single remember.

nodes.name: TestReviewHardening
nodes.summary: Review hardening for edge cases in remember_batch enrichment including error tolerance and partial failures.

nodes.name: test_e3a3_cross_tier_dedup.py
nodes.summary: Tests for E3A3 cross-tier deduplication ensuring that working memory and episodic memory results are properly deduplicated in both linear and polyphonic recall paths.

nodes.name: TestDedupHelperUnit
nodes.summary: Unit tests for cross-tier deduplication helper functions that merge working and episodic memory results.

nodes.name: TestLinearRecallPathIntegration
nodes.summary: Tests cross-tier deduplication integration in the linear recall path.

nodes.name: TestPolyphonicRecallPathIntegration
nodes.summary: Tests cross-tier deduplication integration in the polyphonic recall path with RRF scoring.

nodes.name: TestReviewHardening
nodes.summary: Review hardening tests for cross-tier dedup edge cases including empty results and boundary conditions.
